title: Forge Local Schema
description: Schema for .claude/forge.local.md YAML frontmatter. Defines per-project configuration including tech stack, commands, and module bindings.

components.description: Tech stack component declarations. Single-component projects use flat keys; multi-service uses named entries with path:

language.description: Primary language. Must match a file in modules/languages/. null for k8s.

framework.description: Framework. Must match a directory in modules/frameworks/.

testing.description: Testing framework. Must match a file in modules/testing/.

variant.description: Framework variant. Must match a file in modules/frameworks/{framework}/variants/{value}.md.

web.description: Web layer binding (e.g., thymeleaf, htmx). Framework-specific.

persistence.description: Persistence layer binding (e.g., jpa, exposed, r2dbc). Framework-specific.

database.description: Database module. Must match a file in modules/databases/.

migrations.description: Migration tool module. Must match a file in modules/migrations/.

api_protocol.description: API protocol module. Must match a file in modules/api-protocols/.

messaging.description: Messaging module. Must match a file in modules/messaging/.

caching.description: Caching module. Must match a file in modules/caching/.

search.description: Search module. Must match a file in modules/search/.

storage.description: Storage module. Must match a file in modules/storage/.

auth.description: Auth module. Must match a file in modules/auth/.

observability.description: Observability module. Must match a file in modules/observability/.

build_system.description: Build system module. Must match a file in modules/build-systems/.

ci.description: CI/CD module. Must match a file in modules/ci-cd/.

container.description: Container orchestration module. Must match a file in modules/container-orchestration/.

orchestrator.description: Container orchestrator. Must match a file in modules/container-orchestration/.

code_quality.description: Code quality tools list. Each entry must match a file in modules/code-quality/. Supports string list or object form with external ruleset.

test_single.description: Command to run a single test file. Optional.

conventions_file.description: Path to main framework conventions file. Required.

conventions_variant.description: Path to variant conventions file. Optional.

conventions_testing.description: Path to testing conventions file. Optional.

conventions_web.description: Path to web layer conventions file. Optional.

conventions_persistence.description: Path to persistence layer conventions file. Optional.

preempt_file.description: Path to forge-log.md for preemptive pattern loading.

modules.description: Multi-repo module declarations. Each entry represents a repo.

command.description: Override test command for test gate. Should match commands.test.
